name: Coarse Pretzel Salt
tagline: Premium topping for soft pretzels, bagels & artisan breads
description: All-natural, food-grade coarse salt. Heat resistant up to 400°F — stays white and crisp after baking. No additives.
usageTips: Apply immediately after the baking soda bath — before the surface dries
Press gently so crystals adhere; be generous for bakery-style results
Also excellent on bagels, focaccia, and artisan breads
Stays white and crisp up to 400°F — safe for high-heat baking

name: Coarse Pretzel Salt
tagline: Large bag — best value for home bakers
description: The same premium coarse pretzel salt in a large resealable bag. Perfect for high-volume baking or stocking your pantry.
usageTips: Apply immediately after the baking soda bath — before the surface dries
Press gently so crystals adhere; be generous for bakery-style results
Also excellent on bagels, focaccia, and artisan breads
Stays white and crisp up to 400°F — safe for high-heat baking

name: Coarse Pretzel Salt
tagline: Jumbo bag for bakeries & serious home bakers

usageTips: Apply immediately after the baking soda bath — before the surface dries
Press gently so crystals adhere; be generous for bakery-style results

name: Clear Jel Powder
tagline: Cook-type starch for canning & pie filling
description: Non-GMO cook-type Clear Jel powder. Creates thick, stable gels that hold up through heat processing — the gold standard for canning.
usageTips: Mix with sugar before adding to fruit to prevent lumping
Use 7 tablespoons per quart of filling for most fruits
Bring to a full rolling boil and cook 1 minute before filling jars
Cook type only — do not use in no-bake or cold recipes

name: Clear Jel Powder
description: Our large-format Clear Jel bag. Non-GMO, cook-type powder at the best price per ounce for frequent canners and bakers.
usageTips: Mix with sugar before adding to fruit to prevent lumping
Use 7 tablespoons per quart of filling for most fruits
Bring to a full rolling boil and cook 1 minute before filling jars
Cook type only — do not use in no-bake or cold recipes

name: Pink Curing Salt #1
tagline: Prague Powder #1 — Instacure for bacon, ham & jerky
description: Premium Prague Powder #1 (Instacure #1). 6.25% sodium nitrite formulation for short-term curing of bacon, ham, sausage, and jerky.
usageTips: Use exactly 1 teaspoon (6.25g) per 5 lbs of meat — measure precisely
Mix thoroughly with other cure ingredients before applying to meat
Bacon cure time: 7 days refrigerated; turn and redistribute daily
Store labeled and separate from regular table salt

name: Pink Curing Salt #1
tagline: XL bag for serious charcuterie & meat preservation
description: Our largest Pink Curing Salt — ideal for dedicated home curers, hunters, and charcuterie enthusiasts. Prague Powder #1 in a resealable jumbo bag.
usageTips: Use exactly 1 teaspoon (6.25g) per 5 lbs of meat — measure precisely
Mix thoroughly with other cure ingredients before applying to meat
Bacon cure time: 7 days refrigerated; turn and redistribute daily
Store labeled and separate from regular table salt

name: Textured Vegetable Protein
description: Vegan, gluten-free TVP chunks. High in protein, absorbs any flavor or sauce. Perfect for tacos, chili, bolognese, soups, and more.
usageTips: Rehydrate with equal parts boiling water or broth for 10 minutes
Season aggressively — TVP absorbs flavors well
Use in tacos, chili, pasta sauce, soups, or as a meat extender
Rehydrated TVP keeps refrigerated for up to 4 days

name: Pure Xanthan Gum
description: Food-grade xanthan gum powder. A powerful keto-friendly thickener for sauces, dressings, baked goods, and ice cream. A little goes a long way.
usageTips: Gluten-free baking: use 1/4 to 1 tsp per cup of alternative flour
Sauces and dressings: 1/8 to 1/4 tsp per cup of liquid
Always mix with dry ingredients first to prevent clumping
Start with less than you think you need — too much creates gumminess

name: Pure Acacia Gum
description: 100% pure Gum Arabic (Acacia Gum). A natural prebiotic fiber and food-grade thickener for beverages, confections, and supplements.

name: Pure Guar Gum
description: Food-grade guar gum powder. An effective thickener for sauces, soups, baked goods, and dairy-free products.
